**🛡 Cyber Security Program Certification**
## 🎓 Structured Cyber Security Training


> A structured cybersecurity training program focused on practical security implementation, analytical thinking, and project-based validation of defensive security concepts.


---

---

# 🏢 Issuing Organization

**Organization:** EdiGlobe  

**Completion Date:** October 2025  

**Program Type:** Structured Cyber Security Training



---

**📘 Certification Overview**

Successfully completed a structured **Cyber Security Program** focused on practical security implementation, analytical thinking, and project-based execution.

The program required completion of:

        • One Minor Project  

        • One Major Project  


Both projects were designed to demonstrate applied understanding of cybersecurity concepts in real-world scenarios.



---

**🎯 Program Focus Areas**

The certification program covered key domains of cybersecurity including:

        • Ethical Hacking Fundamentals  

        • Web Application Security  

        • Vulnerability Assessment Concepts  

        • Secure Coding Practices  

        • Defensive Security Techniques  



---

**🧪 Project-Based Validation**

As part of the certification requirements, the program included two practical project implementations.



### Minor Project

        • Implemented core security principles  

        • Applied structured vulnerability handling  

        • Designed logical defensive mechanisms  



### Major Project

        • Designed and developed a security-focused application  

        • Demonstrated practical cybersecurity implementation  

        • Applied secure architecture thinking  

        • Implemented defensive security mechanisms  



---

**🧠 Skills Validated**

Through this certification, the following technical capabilities were validated:

        • Vulnerability Identification & Analysis  

        • Secure Application Development  

        • Logical Security Architecture Thinking  

        • Technical Documentation  

        • Problem-Solving in Security Contexts  



---

**🏁 Outcome**

Successfully completed the Cyber Security Program by delivering structured projects and demonstrating:

        • Consistent analytical capability  

        • Disciplined technical execution  

        • Applied understanding of defensive cybersecurity practices
